title: League of Legends
edition_pinned: Patch 12.22, PC, five-player Summoner's Rift, as pinned by the Tier-1 card.
moat: Fogged vision couples lane income, item timing, and objective votes into five-player commitments.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One symmetric map recombines champion kits, hidden movement, item timings, and team objectives into divergent matches.
exemplar_rationale: Shows how partial information and shared objectives bind individual optimization to team commitments.

evidence.claim: Epic Games Store listed these Genres: Action; RPG; Strategy.
